# Marcus Webb

Marcus Webb is the Sustainability Data Lead at Globex, responsible for data infrastructure, cross-entity consolidation, and the GRI-aligned data governance framework being built as part of the CSRD engagement. He manages data pipelines across the twelve in-scope legal entities and is the technical counterpart for methodology and tooling decisions. Marcus is the primary day-to-day contact for data quality issues and reporting timeline coordination.
